prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Hey John, great news - I'm now friends with one of my fellow volunteers! We both love helping others. How have you been since we last chatted?"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Hey Maria, I've been busy with work and family, but last week I had an unexpected incident on my way home. It reminded me how life can throw unexpected troubles our way."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Oh John, that sounds tough. I'm glad you're alright. Life does throw us some surprises, doesn't it?

"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria. This is a reminder to stay strong during tough times."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Yeah John, when stuff like that happens, it's good to tap into our own inner strength. How did you handle it?"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "I tried to stay calm and asked for assistance, which helped me handle the situation and make it back safely."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Hey, John that's awesome! You really showed your resilience and resourcefulness. How did you feel afterwards?"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "I felt relieved and grateful to make it through without incident."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Yeah, it's tough. Appreciate what you've got. You got through it - stay strong. Are there any things you like to do to calm down during times like this?"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria! I like to just take a look at the sunset- it reminds me to enjoy the small things in life."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "It's great to hear that you appreciate the beauty of sunsets! By the way, have there been any developments regarding your political goals?"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "I've been keeping busy since we last talked! I've been looking into local politics, talking to community leaders, and getting to know the needs and hopes of our neighborhood. It's been super informative, and I'm feeling optimistic about it all."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Wow, John! Your dedication to our community is amazing. Keep up the great work! I've been taking some notes about local politics in my notebook."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria! You're super helpful. That gives me some new ideas and plans for our community!"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Glad I could help, John. What's up next for you?"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Next week I have a community meeting coming up, we'll be discussing education and infrastructure upgrades."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Good luck on that! Hope your ideas and concerns get heard."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria! I'm hoping so. I'll definitely stick up for our community. Discussing it is important."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Definitely, John! Talking and working together will make a great difference. You're really doing our community a service by speaking out. It's admirable and inspiring."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Maria, thank you! Your support means a lot. Let's make some change in our community!"
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Yeah, let's do it, John! Working together, we can bring positive changes to the neighborhood as a team."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Yeah, Maria! We can achieve great things if we join forces together."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "Agreed, John! Uniting is essential for making a difference. if we stand together we can tackle any problems and build a great community."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Yeah, Maria! I couldn't agree more. Thanks for being an awesome friend."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] Maria said: "No worries, John. It's really nice to help. We make a great team."
[7:06 pm on 9 January, 2023] John said: "Yup, we rock as a team! Glad to have you.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
